name: Istanbul Biennial
description: A prestigious contemporary art festival featuring international artists and innovative installations across the city.

name: Bosphorus Cruise
description: A relaxing boat tour along the Bosphorus Strait, showcasing Istanbul's waterfront beauty and historic sites.

name: Turkish Night Show
description: An evening of traditional Turkish music, dance performances, and cuisine celebrating Ottoman culture.

name: Whirling Dervishes Ceremony
description: A mesmerizing Sufi ritual featuring whirling dervishes, traditional music, and spiritual chanting.

name: Istanbul Jazz Festival
description: An international jazz festival bringing together renowned musicians for performances across historic venues.

name: Ramadan Nights
description: Special evening events during Ramadan featuring traditional foods, lanterns, and cultural celebrations.

name: Belly Dance Workshop
description: Interactive workshops teaching traditional belly dance moves and Ottoman dance forms.
